svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="RAG Architecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="1414" dy="905" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=16;" value="법령 원문" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="180" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=16;" value="PDF / Text Parsing" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="180" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=16;" value="Metadata 생성" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="180" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=16;" value="조문 단위 Chunking" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="180" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=16;" value="Embedding 생성" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="180" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=16;" value="Vector DB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="180" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=16;" value="Reranking" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="180" y="670" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=16;" value="LLM Answer Generation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="180" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=16;" value="Evaluation & Failure Analysis" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="180" y="850" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="100" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2;html=1;" target="3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="101" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2;html=1;" target="4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" />
